bio.title: Describe yourself
bio.description: A short quote or something about yourself. This is your first impression. Max {{wordLimit}} words.

birthdate.title: Your Birthdate
birthdate.description: You must be at least 21 years old to join Clique.

body_type.title: Describe your body type?
body_type.description: Choose the closest answer that represents you.

date_kids.title: Can you date someone with kids?

options.yes: Yes, I can date someone with kids
options.no_kids: No, I prefer to date people without kids
options.child_free: No, I only date people who prefer child-free life

options.vn_returned: Vietnamese, lived , studied abroad, returned to Vietnam
options.vn_abroad_returning: Vietnamese living abroad, returning to Vietnam
options.vn_overseas_vietnam: Overseas Vietnamese (Viet Kieu) living in Vietnam
options.foreigner_settled: Foreigner living and settled down in Vietnam

diet.title: Do you follow a specific diet?

dressing_style.title: How would you describe your dressing style?
dressing_style.description: Choose the answer that best matches you.

email.title: What is your email?
email.description: We'll use this to keep your account safe.

extra_message.title: Anything else you want to share with Clique?
extra_message.description: Feel free to tell us anything. We're here to listen.
extra_message.footer: Click finish below to complete your profile

family_plan.title: When do you plan to start a family?

options.asap: As soon as possible (under a year)
options.stable: After a stable relationship is established

final_word.title: Select 3 words that best describe you

full_body_photo.title: Full Body Photo
full_body_photo.description: Show us your style! Upload a nice full body photo of yourself.
full_body_photo.preview_text: A high quality photo that represents you well.

gender.title: What is your gender?
gender.description: Help us find the best matches for you.

hometown.title: Where is your homeland?
hometown.description: In case you want to match with someone from the same hometown. If not, select your current location.

id_upload.title: Identity Verification
id_upload.description: Upload a photo of your ID to verify your identity. This is required for safety.

impression.title: When getting to know someone, what usually impresses you the most?

job_title.title: Your Title at work
job_title.description: E.g. Creative Director, Software Engineer, Business Owner.

linkedin.title: Your LinkedIn
linkedin.description: Share your professional profile to help us verify your background.

name.title: What is your name?
name.description: This is how you'll appear on Clique.

occultism.title: Do you consider occultism or fortune telling?

options.none: I'm not interested, I don't believe

profile_photo.title: Profile Photo
profile_photo.description: A nice, clear photo of your face taken recently (only you in the photo).
profile_photo.max_size: Max size: 100 MB. Only you should be in the photo.

salary.title: Monthly Salary
salary.description: Clique will never share this information with your matches.

social_link.title: What is your Facebook or Instagram?
social_link.description: Give us your full profile link, we can't find you just by your nickname.

target_gender.title: Who do you want to date?
target_gender.description: This choice helps us find the best match for your expectations.

visual_archetype.title: Choose the picture you like the most

work_field.title: What field do you work in?
work_field.placeholder: Tell us more about your work...

c_level.label: C-level Management
c_level.sub: CEO, CFO, COO or Business Owner

welcome_round1.joined_clique: You have officially joined the Clique83 community.
welcome_round1.intro_title: Begin Your Journey of Authentic Connection
welcome_round1.intro_desc: To find your perfect 'match', we'll start with Round 1 — The Basic Intake Survey.
welcome_round1.value_prop: This information helps Clique build your most authentic portrait, ensuring every connection starts with true understanding.

r1_completion.title: CONGRATS, YOUR PROFILE IS READY!
r1_completion.r2_desc1: This part helps us understand who you may fit with — from lifestyle and priorities to how you connect in love.

community_guidelines.title: Welcome to

real_profile.title: 1. Real Profile
real_profile.desc: Use your real age, photos, and bio so Clique can find the right match for you.

screening.title: 2. Member Screening
screening.desc: Only approved profiles are allowed into the system.

serious.title: 3. Serious Intent
serious.desc: Only paid profiles can start matching.

time_is_gold.title: 4. Time is Gold
time_is_gold.desc: No chat before the date to avoid wasting time.

real_life.title: 5. Real-life Meetings
real_life.desc: A match is aimed at a real date, not endless chatting.

civil_behavior.title: 6. Civil Behavior
civil_behavior.desc: Respect others as you wish to be respected at the meeting.

be_proactive.title: 7. Be Proactive
be_proactive.desc: Always report bad behavior after a date.

community_guidelines.agreement_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our

step1.title: CONGRATULATIONS, YOU HAVE COMPLETED THE IN-DEPTH SURVEY.
rules: Profile is reviewed before entering the system
Receive one most compatible match at a time
Both want to meet → Book a date (599k / session)

step2.pending_text: Your profile is being reviewed by Clique within the next 1, 2, or 3 days. Remember to check the results here or via email.

step3.approved_title: Congratulations, your profile has been approved!
step3.social_proof: More than 17,000 have joined the Clique system. Are you ready?

step4.pricing_intro: Paying helps filter out those who are not ready, so you don't have to go on meaningless dates.

pricing_details.title: Coffee Date Costs:
pricing_details.membership: 1,999k / year matching fee with curated members
pricing_details.per_session: 599k / session to ensure both truly want to meet

value_prop.title: You don't have to think too much
points: You just decide: to meet or not
